name: triage-todos-harness-skill
title: Replace /work-roadmap with /harness:triage command
description: Automate the manual roadmap triage process as a /harness:triage skill that reads todos.yaml, runs dependency analysis, and produces a phased ROADMAP.md with worktree parallelism strategy

gates.evidence: definition.yaml validated; 4 deliverables defined with acceptance criteria; user approved objective, deliverables, constraints, and gate policy; cross-model review completed with findings incorporated

definition.yaml validated; 4 deliverables defined with acceptance criteria; user approved objective, deliverables, constraints, and gate policy; cross-model review completed with findings incorporated

research.md covers all 4 deliverables: triage command spec (adapt existing 10-step pipeline), harness registration (8 files to repair, symlink mechanism documented), work-todos auto-commit (3 commit message variants), glob-regex bugfix (trailing slash conversion)

plan.json generated: 2 waves, wave 1 has 3 independent deliverables (glob-regex-bugfix, triage-command-spec, work-todos-auto-commit), wave 2 has harness-registration. Single specialist (harness-engineer), no file conflicts, sequential execution.

User approved all 4 spec files: triage-command-spec (rename+adapt work-roadmap), harness-registration (symlink+4 file repairs), work-todos-auto-commit (commit step in both modes), glob-regex-bugfix (trailing slash normalization)
User approved decompose: 2 waves, 4 deliverables, single implementer, sequential execution on existing work/triage-todos branch. plan.json and team-plan.md written.

All 4 deliverables implemented: glob-regex-bugfix (triage-todos.sh), triage-command-spec (commands/triage.md), work-todos-auto-commit (commands/work-todos.md), harness-registration (symlink + 4 reference repairs + deletion). Bonus: validate-step-artifacts.sh ideate->research boundary.
